headline: Coinbase's Chief Policy Officer Tells Elizabeth Warren She Has CLARITY Act ‘Exactly Backward’ On National Security
summary: Faryar Shirzad argued that regulatory uncertainty creates opportunities for bad actors, while the bill would bring crypto platforms under stricter federal oversight.
